title: coristospermum lucidum subsp. cuneifolium
intro: Coristospermum lucidum subsp. cuneifolium is a plant species, also known as a flowering plant, belonging to the family Aristolochiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Coristospermum lucidum subsp. cuneifolium typically involve infusions and decoctions made from its leaves, which are used to make teas or tinctures.
